title: Fun Music Shows for Everyone in 2026
summary: The BBC Proms is a big music festival that will happen in 2026. It will have 86 concerts in places like London and Bristol. There will be music from James Bond movies and prog rock, which is a type of rock music. Famous musicians like Dame Evelyn Glennie and Yuja Wang will play. The festival starts on July 17 and includes a tribute to Disney music and a space-themed show. Every concert will be on the radio and TV. There will also be special concerts for disabled musicians, like Felix Klieser who plays the horn with his feet. The festival celebrates different types of music for everyone to enjoy.

Who is a musician that plays with his feet?

background_read: The BBC Proms is an annual music festival in the UK that started in 1895. It features classical music, but also includes other styles like pop and rock. The concerts are held at the Royal Albert Hall in London and other cities. Many famous musicians perform there, and it is broadcast so people everywhere can enjoy it. The festival aims to make music accessible to everyone, including people with disabilities, by having inclusive performances.
Article_Structure: WHO: The BBC Proms festival organizers and musicians like Dame Evelyn Glennie.
WHAT: A music festival with 86 concerts featuring James Bond music, prog rock, and tributes.
WHERE: In cities like London, Gateshead, Bristol, Middlesbrough, Sunderland, and Mold.
WHY: To celebrate different types of music and include everyone, including disabled musicians.

perspectives.description: The festival includes diverse music styles and performers to reach a wide audience.
